idea-plugin.name: Makinda Icons
idea-plugin.description:
Beautiful, consistent file icons for the IntelliJ Platform — the same icon set as the Makinda Icons VS Code extension.

102 file icons — Solid style, auto-adapts to light and dark IDE themes.

Covers: JavaScript · TypeScript · Python · Rust · Go · Java · PHP · C/C++ · Ruby · Vue · Svelte · Astro · Dart · SQL · TOML · Shell scripts (bash, zsh, fish, powershell, nushell) · Git dotfiles · .env / dotenv · README · CHANGELOG · SECURITY · CONTRIBUTING · Next.js config · and many more.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0

  • Added 29 new file icons: dart, bash, zsh, fish, powershell, nushell, batch, sql, toml, tsv, binary, env, dotenv, editorconfig, gitignore, gitattributes, gitmodules, npmignore, readme, changelog, notice, authors, contributing, code-of-conduct, security, todo, next, javascript, typescript
  • Upgraded coarse mappings to dedicated icons: .gitignore, .env, .toml, .bat/.cmd, .ps1, README.md, etc.
  • Added rc-file name bindings: .bashrc, .zshrc, .zprofile, config.fish, and shell history files
  • Added 138 extension mappings and 107 filename mappings total

1.0.0

  • Initial JetBrains release: 55 file icons via FileIconProvider
  • Auto light/dark via _dark.svg variants
